function.name: compare_stocks
function.description: Compare multiple stocks by current price and daily movement.
function.long_description: Retrieves live quote summaries for multiple stock symbols and highlights best and worst daily performers using percentage change.

symbols.description: List of stock symbols to compare

example_user_queries: Compare the stocks AAPL, MSFT, and GOOGL.
Show a comparison of TSLA versus NVDA.
Compare stock symbols AMZN, META, and NFLX.
How do JPM and BAC compare?
Run a stock comparison for IBM, ORCL, and SAP.
Compare these stocks: AMD, INTC, QCOM.
Give me a comparison of KO and PEP.
Compare symbols DIS, CMCSA, and PARA.
Show comparative stock data for WMT, COST, and TGT.
